description: Define your Atlas Vector Search Index

fields.markdownDescription: Array of fields to index for vector search.
fields.description: Array of fields to index for vector search.

name.markdownDescription: Label that identifies the index. If you omit this parameter, it defaults to `vectorIndex`. You must specify unique index names in each [collection](https://dochub.mongodb.org/core/collection-fts).

database.markdownDescription: Label that identifies the database to contain the index.
database.description: Label that identifies the database to contain the index.

collectionName.markdownDescription: Label that identifies the collection to index.
collectionName.description: Label that identifies the collection to index.
